IF(
  {fldxVAackD0buQIba},
  {fldxVAackD0buQIba},
  SWITCH(
    {fldOQBVTSNODRhRcd},
    "Submission Base",
      IF(
        {fldvA0LSFK6uDlreq},
        DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldvA0LSFK6uDlreq})),
        CREATED_TIME()
      ),
    "Homework Completion",

      ),
    "Streak",

        {fldHvhlnWHKlvNQDW},

        CREATED_TIME()
      ),
    "Weekly Threshold",

        DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldbyfXAlNtDtEc6q})),
        CREATED_TIME()
      ),
    "Perfect Week",

        {fldbyfXAlNtDtEc6q},
        DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldbyfXAlNtDtEc6q})),
        CREATED_TIME()
      ),
    "Zoom Attendance",

        IF(
          {fldfOBZ6TB0ifLZXx},
          DATETIME_PARSE(ARRAYJOIN({fldfOBZ6TB0ifLZXx})),
          CREATED_TIME()
        )
      ),
    CREATED_TIME()
  )
)
